messages.author: floeschie
messages.text: I got a T-Deck Plus (the older version) and wanted to install MeshCore. Flashing v7.9 went fine so far, and I configured the network (Freq, BW, SF, CR) to the same settings as my other Companion. When I select this network, I get an option "identity". I leave ID to "0" (default value) and set a name to "Floh" there, pressed Enter to save. However, the name value won't persist. When I go out of Identity settings and back in, the value for name is gone. Rebooting also doesn't help. Any ideas?
messages.content_html: I got a T-Deck Plus (the older version) and wanted to install MeshCore. Flashing v7.9 went fine so far, and I configured the network (Freq, BW, SF, CR) to the same settings as my other Companion. When I select this network, I get an option "identity". I leave ID to "0" (default value) and set a name to "Floh" there, pressed Enter to save. However, the name value won't persist. When I go out of Identity settings and back in, the value for name is gone. Rebooting also doesn't help. Any ideas?

messages.author: floeschie
messages.text: I also cannot pair via Bluetooth, and the CLI via serial doesn't do anythint (entered "ver" but got nothing returned).
messages.content_html: I also cannot pair via Bluetooth, and the CLI via serial doesn't do anythint (entered "ver" but got nothing returned).
